author: ESPN YouTube
text:
‘DO NOT UNDERESTIMATE NEW YORK’ 😤 Are the Knicks the best team in the NBA? 👀  | NBA Today
Brian Windhorst, Danny Green and Marc J. Spears join Malika Andrews on NBA Today to discuss the New York Knicks 4-0 sweep over the Cleveland Cavaliers in the Eastern Conference Finals. They break down how the Knicks could match up against the San Antonio Spurs or Oklahoma City Thunder in the NBA Finals and why they should not be counted out.
